variants.name: EVIQUE-Full
variants.description: Full EVIQUE with query-aware planner and utility-aware evidence packaging.

variants.name: EVIQUE-w/o-Planner
variants.description: Disable query-aware view planning and use a fixed view order for all queries.

variants.name: EVIQUE-w/o-Packaging
variants.description: Disable utility-aware evidence packaging and use raw top-k evidence under the same token budget.

variants.name: EVIQUE-FixedWindowEvent
variants.description: Replace adaptive/visual event evidence with fixed-window event evidence generated from existing object/track timestamps.

variants.name: EVIQUE-w/o-Planner-Packaging
variants.description: Disable both query-aware planning and utility-aware packaging.
